summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. Security-sensitive PRs are scoped to route_security; closed PR #83527 is kept closed; all other open PRs are non-mutating keep classifications because close, merge, and fix paths are either disabled or blocked by draft state, review findings, checks, maintainer comments, or product/technical review needs.

actions.reason: Related to the hydrated cron event-time issue, but not closable or mergeable in this plan shard.
